name: Iwa Kakure no Jounin
description: Appears in Naruto Shippuuden Episode #190.  An Iwagakure kunoichi that led a battalion of Iwagakure ninja to attack Konohagakure's border after its invasion by Sunagakure and Otogakure.  She is shown to be very cruel as she sacrificed many Iwagakure genin during her fight with Kosuke Maruboshi. She also has a liking of cutting her opponents into pieces.  She has long brown-coloured hair which she ties in such a fashion as to form a ball on top of her head, using what appears to be a knitting-needle, while two large locks with darkened tips frame the remainder of her face. Her typical attire is similar to Ino Yamanaka's in that it consists of a short sleeveless dress, further adorned by the presence of numerous bandages that encircle various portions of her body, including her waist and thighs.   ~!She was defeated when Kosuke used his Water Release: Water Dragon Bullet Technique to overpower her Earth Release: Earth and Stone Dragon.!~
